testcase.name: test_create_student_inquiry_with_other_skill
testcase.failure: tests/test_student_payments_and_skills.py:138: in test_create_student_inquiry_with_other_skill assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Expected 200/201, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200/201, got 404: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 in [200, 201] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
